body.title: Pull Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct Q4 on CPU-only machines
body.result: Pulls started on yogai7 (DeepSeek+coder) and yoga9i (coder) via Start-Process background. Fixed SSH key path (igor_ed25519) and Windows Ollama path (_ollama_cmd helper) in cluster_ssh.py
body.description: ollama pull qwen2.5-coder:7b-instruct-q4_K_M on yogai7 and yoga9i (CPU-only, no GPU). Code-specific fine-tune, runs ~4 tok/s on CPU, designed for structured output. Better than general-purpose 7B for PE chain edit generation. After pull: update machines DB ollama_model_batch to include this model. Test with a simple edit task via ssh_exec.
